title: show()
text: show() Display the View inside its parent element as specified when the View was created (using uniface.Instance.createView ). unifaceViewObject . show() Return Value None Description When a View is first created, it is automatically displayed in the specified parent element. You can use show() to show it again after it has been hidden using View.hide() . Note: This function does not work with the default view that is automatically created by the weblayout ProcScript command. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
